"'''Operation: Clodhopper'''" was an online adventure published at [[Wizards.com]] on [[February 13]], [[2001]] for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', based on the "[[The Defoliation Agenda]]" story idea from the ''[[Secrets of Naboo]]'' campaign pack.

{{Game-stub}}

==Plot summary==
Shortly after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], a group of adventurers are employed by an ecoterrorist group to transport dangerous animals off [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] for political gain.
